text: <par>Muya <latinform>nɯ³³</latinform> likely derived from <xref ref="253">#253</xref>, since PTB <reconstruction>*-əw</reconstruction> most often becomes Muya <latinform>-ɯ</latinform>, e.g. 'steal' PTB <reconstruction>*r-kəw</reconstruction> > WT <latinform>rku</latinform>, WB <latinform>khûi</latinform>, Muya <latinform>kɯ⁵⁵</latinform>; 'sky' PTB <reconstruction>*r-məw</reconstruction> > WT <latinform>rmu-ba</latinform> 'fog', WB <latinform>mûi(gh)</latinform>, Muya <latinform>mɯ⁵⁵</latinform>.</par>
<par>It seems to be the second syllable of these Muya forms which belongs in this set. See the note under <xref ref="253">#253 </xref>.</par>
